PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexandra Jackson, Esq., counsel for Anson Ly, Trustee/Objector; Christopher Land, Esq., counsel for Oi Ping Doris Lo, Petitioner (appearing by video conference)

Ms. Jackson advises the Court that the parties have agreed that the matters on the Court's calendar today are best synchronized with the related trust matter, currently scheduled for November 27, 2022. She also notes that the parties are scheduled for mediation on November 7, 2022. Noting the same, the Court agrees and continues all matters to November 22, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

[Post-script: Subsequent to the hearing, the Court determines that all matters, including hearing in the related trust, shall be continued to December 5, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.]

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Singh. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Oct-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Land, via Zoom, for Oi Ping Doris Lo, Petitioner; Alexandra Banis and Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Anson Ly, Objector.

Ms. Banis reports that she was recently retained by Anson Ly and that a substitution of attorney is pending in the court's e-filing queue and requests a ninety-day continuance accordingly. Mr. Land offers his position and reports that the matter is ready for trial.

After additional discussion, the three matters set for hearing today are continued to Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Land, via Zoom, for Oi Ping Doris Lo, Petitioner; Kristina Lam, via Zoom, for and with Anson Ly, Objector.

Mr. Land reports that the parties have exchanged some written discovery and the parties remain firm in their positions with the matters likely going to trial. The court asks why these matters should not be reframed as Trust Petitions. Mr. Land advises that he believes that the petitions are properly framed. Ms. Lam disagrees with Mr. Land and advises that the petitions should be Trust petitions. The court reminds Mr. Lam of possible issues moving forward if the petitions are not properly framed and encourages counsel to continue to meet and confer and instructs counsel to discuss potential trial dates.

The matters are continued to Jul-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Trial Setting is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Continued To Mar-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chris Land, via ZOOM, for Oi Ping Doris Lo, Petitioner; Rowena Navia, via ZOOM, for Anson Ly, Objector.

Mr. Land reports that he is pursuing discovery responses which are currently due by Jan-28-2022. Ms. Navia reports that her client hopes to resolve this matter and believes that opposing counsel agrees and requests a continuance. Mr. Land agrees with Ms. Navia and does not oppose her request for a continuance.

The Petitions in this matter are continued to Mar-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia, via ZOOM, for Anson Ly, via ZOOM, Trustee; Chris Land, via ZOOM, for Oi Ping Lo, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with Mr. Land that the real property is an asset of the trust. Mr. Land reports that although his client has not been formally appointed as a representative of the estate, his client has been paying mortgage and property taxes on the real property. Ms. Navia reports that she filed an objection to the petition but is willing to discuss settlement with Mr. Land. Mr. Land confirms the preceding and mentions that he would like settlement discussions to include his client remaining in the property. Ms. Navia confirms that after the decedent died, her client had discussed with Ms. Lo regarding what to do with the real property. The court asks if the parties can agree to allow Ms. Lo to remain in the property while they attempt to resolve this matter. Mr. Ly advises that he is fine with Ms. Lo remaining in the property. Ms. Navia then reports that she will further discuss this matter with her client and also that she doesn't believe that Ms. Lo resides at the property. The court then confirms with the parties that based on the value of the property this matter is appropriate to be ordered to pro bono mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Dec-01-2021. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Dec-08-2021. The parties are to return on Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel is to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the mediation order.

The Petition for Family Allowance, etc., is continued to Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Spousal Property Petition currently set for Dec-08-2021 is also continued to Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
